tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: Are any measurement labels visible in the image? Also, find the mass size and identify its abdominal quadrant.

dialogs.thought: Begin by checking for any overlaid measurement labels or annotations on the CT image that might directly report mass size or location.
No measurement labels are visible. Review the CT image to assess the presence, extent, and anatomical location of the abdominal mass.

content.content: Axial abdominal CT image demonstrates a large, well-defined heterogeneous mass occupying much of the upper abdomen, with displacement of adjacent organs, particularly near the stomach and liver.

dialogs.thought: Based on its visual extent relative to surrounding organs, estimate the mass dimensions and infer its abdominal quadrant.

arguments.attribute: approximate size of the mass and its location relative to abdominal quadrants

content.content: The mass is large, measuring approximately 12 × 8 × 8 cm based on its extent within the abdomen. It is predominantly located in the left upper quadrant, adjacent to the stomach and left hepatic lobe.

dialogs.content: No on-image measurement labels are present. The CT scan shows a large abdominal mass measuring approximately 12 × 8 × 8 cm, located in the left upper quadrant.

whitelist: No, left upper quadrant, 12 x 8 x 8 cm.
